Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Performance Patch (perf increase)
Metadata.Note: Modifies some of the games debug parameters for better performance, will probably affect some visuals.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Disable Motion Blur (perf increase)
Metadata.Note: Disable Motion Blur constructor, which also disables the velomap render, performance increase.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Disable Dynamic Light Shadows (perf increase)
Metadata.Note: Disable Dynamic Light Shadow, stops a ton of heavy draw calls, performance increase.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Disable AA
Metadata.Note: Disables Anti-Aliasing constructor.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Disable DoF
Metadata.Note: Disables Depth of Field
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Disable SSAO
Metadata.Note: Disables Screen Space Ambient Occlusion constructor.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Enable Screen Space Reflections (READ NOTE)
Metadata.Note: This will DECREASE performance, BUT it enables SSR, very nice reflections on reflective surfaces, was never in the base game but can be enabled through debug functions.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 50% Text scale
Metadata.Note:
Smaller text, looks good on higher resolutions.
If you want to try other resolution values: 
 90%:6666663F 
80%:CDCC4C3F 
70%:3333333F 
60%:9A99193F 
50%:0000003F
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: FMOD Crash Fix
Metadata.Note: May unintionally prevent some sound playback?
Metadata.Author: Dasaav

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Model LOD 2 (Lowest)
Metadata.Note: Lowest model detail, performance increase. Affects visuals, lower Model LOD.
Metadata.Author: Kyo, auser1337

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Model LOD 1 (Lower)
Metadata.Note: Slightly lower model detail, performance increase. Affects visuals, lower Model LOD.
Metadata.Author: Kyo, auser1337

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Model LOD -2 (Highest)
Metadata.Note: Highest model detail, performance increase. Affects visuals, Higher model LOD.
Metadata.Author: Kyo, auser1337

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Increased Graphics Heap Sizes
Metadata.Author: auser1337
Metadata.Note:
This patch increases the graphic heap size, 
allowing more memory to be used. 
MUST BE USED WITH INCREASED DMEM. 
keep in mind this is already in resolution patches above 1080p,
but some users requested it seperately.

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Intel 12th Gen+ SFX workaround
Metadata.Note: Disables part of SFX related code to workaround crash on Windows with newer Intel chips (SFX folder can be used with patch)
Metadata.Author: emoose

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Intel Black Tonemap Fix
Metadata.Note: Fixes the black tonemap colors, most notable in DLC areas when using Intel CPU.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: DS1-like physics
Metadata.Note: Can fling around corpses and whatnot.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Lower object/corpse physics
Metadata.Note: Corpses resist movement by the player or other actions.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 30 FPS++
Metadata.Note: Changes some frame settings like the frame skip, vsync, frame tearing, etc.. \nWill help with better input delay/response times for 30 FPS.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 60FPS (no deltatime)
Metadata.Note: Just timesteps, no deltatime. Cloth, corpses, etc, won't 'jump' if you lag or stutter, but game speed might slow if you drop below 60 fps.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 60 FPS++
Metadata.Note: Changes some frame settings like the frame skip, vsync, frame tearing, etc.. \nWill help with better input delay/response times for 60 FPS.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 90 FPS++
Metadata.Note: Changes some frame settings like the frame skip, vsync, frame tearing, etc.. \nWill help with better input delay/response times for 90 FPS. Remember to change Vblank to 90 or higher.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Uncap FPS++
Metadata.Note: Not really recommended as a lot of the timestep fixes would vary with fluctuating frame cap. Remember to increase vblank frequency.
Metadata.Author: Lance McDonald (manfightdragon), Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Restore Debug Menu (READ NOTES)
Metadata.Author: Whitehawkx, auser1337
Metadata.Note: This patch requires debug font files, which is available from nexusmods. It will crash without them. Access the menu by pressing left side of touchpad.

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Disable Camera Auto Rotation via Movement
Metadata.Note: Disables the camera from auto rotating when you move your character around, manual camera movement and lock-on still work.
Metadata.Author: Imedved, Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Increased camera distance
Metadata.Note: Playercam further away from player.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: No Rally Decay
Metadata.Note: Rally doesn't decay
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Disable Rally (HP Regain)
Metadata.Note: Disables Rally
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Player No Dead (Read note)
Metadata.Note: Can take damage but never drop below 1hp. (baby mode)
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Player Stealth (Read note)
Metadata.Note: Enemies do not see or react to you (unless attacked)
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Player Silent (Read note)
Metadata.Note: Enemies do not hear you but can still see you.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Sensitive Analog Input (easier to run)
Metadata.Note: Normally you walk and don't run until your analog stick moves 90% distance, this lowers that to around ~70% distance or something.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Unlock Game Region
Metadata.Note: Unlocks the game region to support additional language options, Doesn't switch the X and Circle buttons
Metadata.Author: Lance McDonald (manfightdragon), Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Enemy Control
Metadata.Note: R3 to control targeted enemy / L3 to go back
Metadata.Author: stagvant

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 1280x800 Light Grid For SteamDeck (READ NOTES)
Metadata.Note: Increases performance by lowering Light grid draw calls. USE VERSION THAT MATCHES YOUR WINDOW/FULLSCREEN RESOLUTION, NOT RENDER RESOLUTION PATCH.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 1080p Light Grid (READ NOTES)
Metadata.Note: Increases performance by lowering Light grid draw calls. USE VERSION THAT MATCHES YOUR WINDOW/FULLSCREEN RESOLUTION, NOT RENDER RESOLUTION PATCH. (Note: 1080p light grid is also in the performance patch)
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 1440p Light Grid (READ NOTES)
Metadata.Note: Increases performance by lowering Light grid draw calls. USE VERSION THAT MATCHES YOUR WINDOW/FULLSCREEN RESOLUTION, NOT RENDER RESOLUTION PATCH.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: 4k Light Grid (READ NOTES)
Metadata.Note: Increases performance by lowering Light grid draw calls. USE VERSION THAT MATCHES YOUR WINDOW/FULLSCREEN RESOLUTION, NOT RENDER RESOLUTION PATCH.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Optimal 1080p
Metadata.Note: 360p global with main renders at 1080p
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 640x360 (16:9)
Metadata.Note: 640x360 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 960x540 (16:9)
Metadata.Note: 960x540 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 1280x720 (16:9)
Metadata.Note: 1280x720 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 1440x810 (16:9)
Metadata.Note: 1440x810 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 1600x900 (16:9)
Metadata.Note: 1600x900 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 2560x1440 (16:9)
Metadata.Note: 2560x1440 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 3840x2160 (16:9)
Metadata.Note: 3840x2160 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 1280x800 (16:10)
Metadata.Note: 1280x800 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 1920x1200 (16:10)
Metadata.Note: 1920x1200 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 2560x1600 (16:10)
Metadata.Note: 2560x1600 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 2560x1080 (21:9)
Metadata.Note: 2560x1080 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 3440x1440 (21:9)
Metadata.Note: 3440x1440 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 5120x2160 (21:9)
Metadata.Note: 5120x2160 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 3840x1080 (32:9)
Metadata.Note: 3840x1080 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 5180x1440 (32:9)
Metadata.Note: 5180x1440 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates. Remember to increase dmem +8000mb or so in game-specific settings.
Metadata.Author: Kyo

Metadata.Title: Bloodborne
Metadata.Name: Resolution Patch 1280x960 (4:3)
Metadata.Note: 1280x960 resolution with proper lock-on/enemy/ally hp bar coordinates.
Metadata.Author: Kyo
